bar.tooltip.recording:
OBS recording is active
Left click {primaryAction}
Right click stops recording
Middle click toggles the replay buffer
bar.tooltip.replay:
OBS replay buffer is active
Left click {primaryAction}
Right click toggles recording
Middle click stops the replay buffer
control_center.tooltip.recording:
OBS recording is active
Left click {primaryAction}
Right click stops recording
Middle click toggles the replay buffer
control_center.tooltip.replay:
OBS replay buffer is active
Left click {primaryAction}
Right click starts recording
Middle click stops the replay buffer
control_center.tooltip.ready:
OBS is ready
Left click {primaryAction}
Right click starts recording
Middle click toggles the replay buffer
control_center.tooltip.needs_restart:
OBS is running, but WebSocket control is unavailable
Restart OBS once to restore controls
panel.header.title: OBS Control
panel.header.recording: Recording is active. Stop the capture or manage replay actions from here.
panel.header.replay: Replay buffer is active. Save the latest replay at any time.
panel.header.ready: OBS is connected and ready for recording or replay.
panel.header.needs_restart: OBS is open, but WebSocket control is unavailable until it is restarted once.
panel.header.offline: OBS is offline. Launch it here and the widget will track its state.
panel.status.label: Status
panel.status.connected_hint: The bar indicator follows recording state. Left click opens this panel, right click toggles recording, and middle click toggles replay.
panel.status.disconnected_hint: WebSocket control is unavailable right now. Launch or restart OBS to restore quick actions.
settings.header.label: OBS Control
settings.header.description: Control how often the plugin polls OBS and when it becomes visible in the shell.
settings.poll_interval.label: Poll Interval
settings.poll_interval.description: How often the plugin refreshes OBS state, in milliseconds.
settings.left_click_action.label: Left Click Action
settings.left_click_action.description: Choose whether left click opens the panel or toggles recording directly.
settings.videos_path.label: Videos Path
settings.videos_path.description: Optional custom folder used by the panel and the toast action. Leave empty to use your default Videos directory.
settings.show_bar_recording.label: Show Bar While Recording
settings.show_bar_recording.description: Display the bar indicator while OBS is actively recording.
settings.show_bar_replay.label: Show Bar While Replay Is Active
settings.show_bar_replay.description: Keep the bar indicator visible when only the replay buffer is running.
settings.show_control_center_recording.d: Show the Control Center shortcut while OBS is recording.
settings.show_control_center_replay.labe: Show Control Center While Replay Is Active
settings.show_control_center_replay.desc: Show the Control Center shortcut while the replay buffer is active.
settings.show_control_center_ready.label: Show Control Center When OBS Is Ready
settings.show_control_center_ready.descr: Keep the shortcut visible when OBS is connected but idle.
toast.record_started.title: OBS recording started
toast.record_started_launch.title: OBS recording started
toast.record_stopped.title: OBS recording stopped
toast.replay_started.title: OBS replay buffer started
toast.replay_started_launch.title: OBS replay buffer started
toast.replay_stopped.title: OBS replay buffer stopped
toast.replay_saved.title: OBS replay saved
toast.replay_saved.body: Saved the last replay buffer to Videos.
toast.offline.title: OBS is offline
toast.offline.body: Launch OBS to use recording controls.
toast.error.title: OBS control failed
